markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss procurement details and contract terms for potential partnership between Cresta and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Cresta seeks 3-6 month pilot period in Phase 2; GrowthX typically only offers 7-week opt-out in Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Budget mismatch: Cresta aims for \~$7K/mo; GrowthX starts at $15K/mo for Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Next step: Cresta to send redlined contract for GrowthX review](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Partnership viability uncertain due to misaligned expectations on contract structure and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

## Topics

### Contract Structure and Risk Mitigation

  - [Cresta wants 3-6 month pilot period in Phase 2 for risk mitigation](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [GrowthX's structure: 8-week Phase 1 (7-week opt-out window), then 12-month Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [GrowthX unwilling to offer opt-out in Phase 2 due to resource allocation constraints](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [Cresta suggests contingency contract with KPIs for first 2 months of Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX open to considering termination for breach clause instead of pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Deliverables and Performance Metrics

  - [Phase 1 (8 weeks): Strategy sprint, limited content creation, alignment on goals](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Phase 2: Daily content creation, weekly reporting, focus on long-term growth](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Key metrics: Content refreshes, new content pieces, web traffic (esp. AI-specific), LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term investment vs. short-term vanity metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Pricing and Budget

  - [Current GrowthX pricing: $15K/month for Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Cresta's budget: \~$7K/month](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Significant gap in expectations, potential dealbreaker](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Confidence in Results

  - [GrowthX expresses high confidence in delivering results](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Cites churn as critical metric for their business, emphasizing commitment to client success](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Cresta views confidence as reason to offer pilot period; GrowthX disagrees](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cresta to prepare and send redlined contract to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [GrowthX (Marcel) to review redlines and respond](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Both parties to reassess partnership viability based on contract negotiations](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [If agreement reached, proceed with vendor onboarding and security processes](https://fathom.video/share/xLbAjd2QsdCk_sxRaSpZ9XqsksTksWpy?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
